data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no evidence supporting its implementation or testing, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of retry-safe ingestion with idempotency and failure visibility.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
